$comment: Curated captures of every page of Roberta Sparrow's 'The Philosophy of Time Travel' (philosophy.swf, is_unstable.html). Captured 2026-06-03 in an owner-driven recorder session (src/record-chapters.js): the owner clicked each of the chapter crosshairs while the recorder saved a brightened (3×) frame per click — the in-game pages render almost black. Chapter names match the hover tooltips and THE-PHILOSOPHY-OF-TIME-TRAVEL.md.
